form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Mt Gambier over 732m in 43.11. Followed that up with a minor placing over 530m at Murray Bridge at Grade 5/6 six days ago. This appears within his reach.

formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Mt Gambier over 732m in 43.11. Followed that up with a minor placing over 530m at Murray Bridge at Grade 5/6 six days ago. This appears within his reach.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turn out of home straight.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 595m. Last start finished 2nd over 531m at Gawler beaten 0.8 lengths (30.81) behind Rhinestone in a Grade 5 on April 12. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 595m in 34.43. Followed that up with a minor placing over 595m at this track at OPEN a week ago. Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 6 length fifth over 600m at The Meadows. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.25) in a Special conditions race, finishing a 4 length fourth. Yet to miss the frame from six starts from the draw, including two wins. Makes strong appeal.
